lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਸਚੁ ਦਿੜਾਇਆ ਸਦਾ ਸਚਿ ਸੰਜਮਿ ਰਹਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sach dirraaeaa sadaa sach sanjam rahanaa |
lines.english: The True Guru has implanted the Truth within me; I dwell steadfastly in Truth and self-restraint.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹੁ ਜਗੁ ਜਲਤਾ ਦੇਖਿ ਕੈ ਭਜਿ ਪਏ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਰਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: ehu jag jalataa dekh kai bhaj pe satigur saranaa |
lines.english: Seeing this world on fire, I rushed to the Sanctuary of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖ ਚਉਰਾਸੀਹ ਫਿਰਦੇ ਰਹੇ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: lakh chauraaseeh firade rahe bin satigur mukat na hoee |
lines.english: People continue wandering through the cycle of 8.4 million incarnations; without the True Guru, liberation is not obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਚਾ ਹੈ ਬੋਹਿਥਾ ਸਬਦੇ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਤਰਣਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: satigur sachaa hai bohithaa sabade bhavajal taranaa |6|
lines.english: The True Guru is the Boat of Truth; in the Word of the Shabad, we cross over the terrifying world-ocean. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੜਿ ਪੜਿ ਪੰਡਿਤ ਮੋਨੀ ਥਕੇ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਪਤਿ ਖੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: parr parr panddit monee thake doojai bhaae pat khoee |
lines.english: Reading and studying, the Pandits and the silent sages have grown weary, but attached to the love of duality, they have lost their honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਸੁਣਾਇਆ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਚੇ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: satigur sabad sunaaeaa bin sache avar na koee |7|
lines.english: The True Guru teaches the Word of the Shabad; without the True One, there is no other at all. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਸਚੈ ਲਾਏ ਸੇ ਸਚਿ ਲਗੇ ਨਿਤ ਸਚੀ ਕਾਰ ਕਰੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: jo sachai laae se sach lage nit sachee kaar karan |
lines.english: Those who are linked by the True One are linked to Truth. They always act in Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਭਗਤ ਸੁਖੀਏ ਸਦਾ ਸਚੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਚੰਨਿ ॥੮॥੧੭॥੮॥੨੫॥
lines.translit: naanak bhagat sukhee sadaa sachai naam rachan |8|17|8|25|
lines.english: O Nanak, the devotees are happy and peaceful forever. They are absorbed in the True Name. ||8||17||8||25||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨਾ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸਾ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਚੈ ਮਹਲਿ ਰਹੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: tinaa nij ghar vaasaa paaeaa sachai mehal rahan |
lines.english: They attain their dwelling in the home of their own inner being, and they abide in the Mansion of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਮੁਸਕਲੁ ਅਤਿ ਬਣੈ ਢੋਈ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kau musakal at banai dtoee koe na dee |
lines.english: When you are confronted with terrible hardships, and no one offers you any support,

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਗੂ ਹੋਏ ਦੁਸਮਨਾ ਸਾਕ ਭਿ ਭਜਿ ਖਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: laagoo hoe dusamanaa saak bhi bhaj khale |
lines.english: when your friends turn into enemies, and even your relatives have deserted you,

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਤਿ ਆਵੈ ਓਸੁ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਲਗੈ ਨ ਤਤੀ ਵਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: chit aavai os paarabraham lagai na tatee vaau |1|
lines.english: -if you then come to remember the Supreme Lord God, even the hot wind shall not touch you. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੋ ਭਜੈ ਆਸਰਾ ਚੁਕੈ ਸਭੁ ਅਸਰਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sabho bhajai aasaraa chukai sabh asaraau |
lines.english: and when all support has given way, and all hope has been lost

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਇ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਥਿਰੁ ਸਦਾ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਸਚੁ ਜਾਣੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aae na jaaee thir sadaa gurasabadee sach jaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He does not come or go; He is Eternal and Permanent. Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, He is known as True. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਨਿਤਾਣਿਆ ਕਾ ਤਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: saahib nitaaniaa kaa taan |
lines.english: Our Lord and Master is the Power of the powerless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਕੋ ਹੋਵੈ ਦੁਬਲਾ ਨੰਗ ਭੁਖ ਕੀ ਪੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: je ko hovai dubalaa nang bhukh kee peer |
lines.english: If you are weakened by the pains of hunger and poverty,

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਮੜਾ ਪਲੈ ਨਾ ਪਵੈ ਨਾ ਕੋ ਦੇਵੈ ਧੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: damarraa palai naa pavai naa ko devai dheer |
lines.english: with no money in your pockets, and no one will give you any comfort,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਆਰਥੁ ਸੁਆਉ ਨ ਕੋ ਕਰੇ ਨਾ ਕਿਛੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਕਾਜੁ ॥
lines.translit: suaarath suaau na ko kare naa kichh hovai kaaj |
lines.english: and no one will satisfy your hopes and desires, and none of your works is accomplished

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਦੇਹੀ ਵਿਆਪੈ ਰੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kau chintaa bahut bahut dehee viaapai rog |
lines.english: When you are plagued by great and excessive anxiety, and diseases of the body;

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਤਿ ਆਵੈ ਓਸੁ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਤਾ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਰਾਜੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: chit aavai os paarabraham taa nihachal hovai raaj |2|
lines.english: -if you then come to remember the Supreme Lord God, you shall obtain the eternal kingdom. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗ੍ਰਿਸਤਿ ਕੁਟੰਬਿ ਪਲੇਟਿਆ ਕਦੇ ਹਰਖੁ ਕਦੇ ਸੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: grisat kuttanb palettiaa kade harakh kade sog |
lines.english: when you are wrapped up in the attachments of household and family, sometimes feeling joy, and then other times sorrow;

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉਣੁ ਕਰੇ ਚਹੁ ਕੁੰਟ ਕਾ ਘੜੀ ਨ ਬੈਸਣੁ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gaun kare chahu kuntt kaa gharree na baisan soe |
lines.english: when you are wandering around in all four directions, and you cannot sit or sleep even for a moment

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਤਿ ਆਵੈ ਓਸੁ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: chit aavai os paarabraham tan man seetal hoe |3|
lines.english: -if you come to remember the Supreme Lord God, then your body and mind shall be cooled and soothed. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮਿ ਕਰੋਧਿ ਮੋਹਿ ਵਸਿ ਕੀਆ ਕਿਰਪਨ ਲੋਭਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: kaam karodh mohi vas keea kirapan lobh piaar |
lines.english: When you are under the power of sexual desire, anger and worldly attachment, or a greedy miser in love with your wealth;

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰੇ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਉਨਿ ਅਘ ਕੀਏ ਹੋਆ ਅਸੁਰ ਸੰਘਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: chaare kilavikh un agh kee hoaa asur sanghaar |
lines.english: if you have committed the four great sins and other mistakes; even if you are a murderous fiend

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੋਥੀ ਗੀਤ ਕਵਿਤ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਕਰਨਿ ਧਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: pothee geet kavit kichh kade na karan dhariaa |
lines.english: who has never taken the time to listen to sacred books, hymns and poetry

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਤਿ ਆਵੈ ਓਸੁ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਤਾ ਨਿਮਖ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਤਰਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: chit aavai os paarabraham taa nimakh simarat tariaa |4|
lines.english: -if you then come to remember the Supreme Lord God, and contemplate Him, even for a moment, you shall be saved. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਤ ਸਿੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਬੇਦ ਚਾਰਿ ਮੁਖਾਗਰ ਬਿਚਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: saasat sinmrit bed chaar mukhaagar bichare |
lines.english: People may recite by heart the Shaastras, the Simritees and the four Vedas;

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਟੁ ਕਰਮਾ ਤੇ ਦੁਗੁਣੇ ਪੂਜਾ ਕਰਤਾ ਨਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: khatt karamaa te dugune poojaa karataa naae |
lines.english: and perform the six ceremonial rituals, over and over again, performing worship services and ritual bathings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਪੇ ਤਪੀਸਰ ਜੋਗੀਆ ਤੀਰਥਿ ਗਵਨੁ ਕਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: tape tapeesar jogeea teerath gavan kare |
lines.english: they may be ascetics, great, self-disciplined Yogis; they may visit sacred shrines of pilgrimage

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗੁ ਨ ਲਗੀ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਤਾ ਸਰਪਰ ਨਰਕੇ ਜਾਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: rang na lagee paarabraham taa sarapar narake jaae |5|
lines.english: Even so, if they have not embraced love for the Supreme Lord God, then they shall surely go to hell. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜ ਮਿਲਕ ਸਿਕਦਾਰੀਆ ਰਸ ਭੋਗਣ ਬਿਸਥਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: raaj milak sikadaareea ras bhogan bisathaar |
lines.english: You may possess empires, vast estates, authority over others, and the enjoyment of myriads of pleasures;

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਗ ਸੁਹਾਵੇ ਸੋਹਣੇ ਚਲੈ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਅਫਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: baag suhaave sohane chalai hukam afaar |
lines.english: you may have delightful and beautiful gardens, and issue unquestioned commands;

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗ ਤਮਾਸੇ ਬਹੁ ਬਿਧੀ ਚਾਇ ਲਗਿ ਰਹਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: rang tamaase bahu bidhee chaae lag rahiaa |
lines.english: you may have enjoyments and entertainments of all sorts and kinds, and continue to enjoy exciting pleasures

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁਤੁ ਧਨਾਢਿ ਅਚਾਰਵੰਤੁ ਸੋਭਾ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਰੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: bahut dhanaadt achaaravant sobhaa niramal reet |
lines.english: You may possess vast riches, maintain virtuous conduct, have a spotless reputation and observe religious customs;

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਆਇਓ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਤਾ ਸਰਪ ਕੀ ਜੂਨਿ ਗਇਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: chit na aaeo paarabraham taa sarap kee joon geaa |6|
lines.english: -and yet, if you do not come to remember the Supreme Lord God, you shall be reincarnated as a snake. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤਾ ਸੁਤ ਭਾਈਆ ਸਾਜਨ ਸੰਗਿ ਪਰੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: maat pitaa sut bhaaeea saajan sang pareet |
lines.english: you may have the loving affections of mother, father, children, siblings and friends;

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਸਕਰ ਤਰਕਸਬੰਦ ਬੰਦ ਜੀਉ ਜੀਉ ਸਗਲੀ ਕੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: lasakar tarakasaband band jeeo jeeo sagalee keet |
lines.english: you may have armies well-equipped with weapons, and all may salute you with respect;
